item.title: Former Meta Engineer: Quantum Computing and Miners Are Bitcoin’s Two Ticking Time Bombs A former Meta engineer @techleadhd says Bitcoin faces two ticking time bombs that have yet to be defused: quantu
item.description: pFormer Meta Engineer: Quantum Computing and Miners Are Bitcoin’s Two Ticking Time Bombsbr /br /A former Meta engineer a href="https://nitter.net/techleadhd" title="TechLead"@techleadhd/a says Bitcoin faces two ticking time bombs that have yet to be defused: quantum computing and the future of miner
